name: Club Sales
description: Club outreach strategy, information pack design, affiliate agreement, target list building, and sales process documentation — nothing exists yet.

actions.task: Design club information pack — polished PDF, 4-6 pages, GO brand colours
Add affiliate agreement to Sprintlaw brief — legal draft needed by end of April
Research and build target club list — AU clubs first (50-100 priority contacts via GA register)
Build affiliate code system — unique codes per club, 12-month attribution, commission tracking
Investigate whether Everfit enterprise includes affiliate/referral tracking natively
Document club sales process — initial contact, follow-up, agreement, code issuance, onboarding
Prepare Gymnastics Australia naming conflict response
Activate Shane Robertson — mid-May once pack, agreement, and process exist
Target: 10-20 clubs signed before soft launch July 1

ideas: Commission model: 25% of subscriber revenue for first 3 months, then 10% ongoing in perpetuity
GO Reporting free access is the primary hook for club sign-ups
Do NOT activate Shane Robertson until materials are ready
